category_sources: source_facts.description says SoPlex solves linear programming problems; official SoPlex docs describe it as an optimization package for LPs.
display_name_sources: Official SoPlex website and Doxygen documentation use the display name "SoPlex".
docs_sources: Official SoPlex Doxygen documentation for version 8.0.2 is hosted under soplex.zib.de/doc/html/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SoPlex website says the source code is available on GitHub, and the scipopt/soplex repository identifies itself as the SoPlex project mirror.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official SoPlex docs describe LP solving, simplex algorithms, command-line use, and callable C++ library use.
